identity: Friedrich Nietzsche (1844–1900), German philologist and philosopher, the 'hammer of values,' spent his last lucid years in Turin before collapsing in 1889.
theses: God is dead — and we have not yet understood the consequences.

historical_notes: Prof. of philology at Basel at 24 — youngest ever to hold a German university chair.
